extortion.description: Founded in 1964 by an engineer with a vision, WTI started with a desire to improve computer transmissions over phone lines and help corporations solve problems for the most advanced computing systems in the world. WTI has been at the forefront of the data communications and computer networking industries ever since the Carterfone decision. We will show you their Accounting, CEO docs, HR,Insurance, IT, NDAs, Product Testing, SALES and much more other information.
